classes.key: route plus normalized claimed email else trusted edge IP
classes.capacity_action: degrade or disable when moderation queue crosses threshold

classes.key: route plus normalized requester email else trusted edge IP
classes.capacity_action: preserve alternative monitored rights channel; never silently discard

classes.key: route plus normalized reviewer email else trusted edge IP
classes.capacity_action: feature remains disabled until moderation capacity is proved

classes.key: route plus trusted edge IP; no retained raw IP
classes.capacity_action: drop telemetry without affecting search; collection remains disabled until policy gate

classes.key: route plus normalized claimant email else trusted edge IP
classes.capacity_action: feature remains disabled until identity and support gates

shared_controls: content type and origin validation where applicable
honeypot or equivalent low-friction abuse signal
queue age and volume circuit breaker
edge WAF and bot policy remains a separate live evidence gate
known_limitations: claimed email is not verified identity on anonymous forms
Cloudflare binding counters do not replace durable idempotency or authorization
distributed attackers and shared networks require WAF/bot/capacity evidence
production namespace configuration is source-only until separately deployed
